treatment_information.specific_treatment: surgical resection of the carotid body tumor
treatment_information.treatment_response: Transient nerve palsy marked by numbness and drooping in the left lip, which had resolved by her 2-month follow-up

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented to emergency department with severe left-sided headache
CT angiogram revealed left carotid body tumor
Surgical resection of the carotid body tumor performed
Headache, photophobia, and other associated symptoms completely resolved

patient_outcome.complications: Transient nerve palsy marked by numbness and drooping in the left lip
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Symptoms resolved by 7 months after discharge
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: No relapse or need for medications
